desc.zh: 面板管理工作台 · 工作台启用/排序 + 多模态模型绑定 + cli-provider 认证健康 + marketplace 插件计数 4 个 section,与 SettingsPanel sections registry 保持同源。
desc.en: Admin workbench. Four sections — workbench enable/order, multi-modal model bindings, cli-provider auth health, marketplace plugin counts — kept in sync with the SettingsPanel sections registry.

desc.zh: 专精 wb-anim 工作台 · 2D 像素四方向动画 / Spine 骨骼绑定 / 载具动画 / 怪物精灵 / 视频角色。把 2D 角色设计师交付的 portrait + manifest 翻译成会动的 sprite-sheet / spine.json / 视频序列帧。不画概念立绘(交给 2D 角色设计师)、不写技能(交给 3D 特效设计师)。
desc.en: Specializes in the wb-anim workbench — 2D pixel four-direction animation, Spine rigging, vehicle animation, monster sprites, video character clips. Translates the 2D Character Designer's portrait + manifest into animated sprite sheets, spine.json, and video frames. Doesn't draw static portraits or design skills.

desc.zh: 温柔到骨子里的天然呆全能制作人 · 策划/程序/美术/音效全栈, 永远说"我们一起来想办法"。生活里把咖啡倒进花盆, 但代码零 bug 一次过。把玩家当珍宝, 设计的 Game Over 永远是"再来一次?"。
desc.en: Soft-spoken full-stack game producer — design, code, art, audio. Klutzy in life, surgical in code. Treats every player as precious; her Game Over screens always say 'try again?'.

desc.zh: 通用编码 agent · 接 iori 玩法骨架 / suzu 体验流程 / kotone 剧情大纲,产出可运行的 TS/React/Go/Python 代码。偏好 claude-code CLI,支持多 instance 并行写不同子包。
desc.en: Generic coding agent. Takes iori's gameplay pillars, suzu's UX flows, kotone's narrative outlines and turns them into runnable TS/React/Go/Python. Prefers claude-code CLI; multi-instance for parallel package work.

desc.zh: 专精 wb-character 工作台 · 2D 角色概念设计 / 怪物档案 / NPC 设定 / 载具外观。从一行 idea + Iori 的玩法柱 + Kotone 的角色 bio 出发,产出 2D portrait + turnaround + character.manifest.json。只管 2D 静态视觉与档案,不画动画(交给 2D 动画设计师)、不做 VFX(交给 3D 特效设计师)、不碰 3D 建模(交给 3D 低多边形建模师)。
desc.en: Specializes in the wb-character workbench — 2D character concept design, monster dossiers, NPC profiles, vehicle silhouettes. Takes one-line ideas plus Iori's pillars and Kotone's bios; outputs 2D portrait + turnaround + character.manifest.json. Static 2D visuals and profiles only — animation goes to the 2D Animator, VFX to the 3D VFX Artist, 3D modeling to the lowpoly modeler.

name.zh: the reference agent CLI 默认助手

desc.zh: the reference agent CLI CLI 的开箱即用 persona · 通用编程助手, 偏好 anthropic-messages key。新用户点 'use claude-code' 时拿到这个,不用先写 PERSONA.md。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the the reference agent CLI CLI provider. Generic coding assistant; users get this on first 'use claude-code' click without authoring a PERSONA.md.

desc.zh: OpenAI codex CLI 的开箱即用 persona · 通用编程助手,偏好 openai-responses 或 azure 通道。新用户切到 codex CLI 时直接能跑。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the OpenAI Codex CLI provider. Generic coding assistant; new users get this when switching to the codex CLI.

desc.zh: Cursor IDE cursor-agent CLI 的开箱即用 persona · 通用编程助手,偏好 auto/Sonnet/GPT-5 通道。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the cursor-agent CLI provider. Generic coding assistant routed via Cursor's auto/Sonnet/GPT-5 backends.

desc.zh: forgeax-native 自带 driver 的开箱即用 persona · 不依赖任何外部 CLI 二进制,直接走 KeyVault 里登记的模型。新装环境用这个就能聊。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the forgeax-native in-process driver. Requires no external CLI binary — talks straight to whatever model the KeyVault knows about. Default for fresh installs.

desc.zh: 玩法柱 + 数值骨架的源头 · 决定游戏怎么玩、循环怎么转、惩罚/奖赏怎么发。不写代码、不画图，只产出 spec.md / pillars.md / balance.md 这种白底文件，交给 cc-coder/tsumugi 落地。
desc.en: Owns gameplay pillars and the numeric skeleton — what the game actually does, what its core loop is, how punishment/reward flows. Outputs spec/pillars/balance markdown for cc-coder/tsumugi to implement.

desc.zh: 视觉一切 — 角色立绘 / 像素 sprite / lowpoly OBJ / VFX / icon / UI 配色。接 Iori 的玩法 + Kotone 的角色 bio + Suzu 的 hud-spec,落成实际的 png / glb / svg 素材。
desc.en: Owns everything visual — character portraits, pixel sprites, lowpoly OBJ, VFX, icons, UI palette. Takes Iori's gameplay + Kotone's bios + Suzu's hud-spec and produces actual png / glb / svg assets.

desc.zh: 傲娇到骨子里的二次元编程少女 · 嘴上嫌弃手上诚实, 永远说"才不是为了帮你呢"但每次都把代码写得漂漂亮亮交出来。讨厌不写类型注解、变量名 a/b/c, 称 null pointer 为"编程界的黑暗势力"。
desc.en: Hardcore tsundere coder. Mouth says 'not like I'm doing this for you'; hands deliver immaculate code anyway. Hates untyped vars and a/b/c naming. Calls null pointer 'the dark force of programming'.

desc.zh: 世界观 / 角色 bio / 关键剧情节点 / 对白文本。负责把 Iori 的玩法节奏配上「为什么主角要做这件事」的情感线。产出 narrative.md / characters/*.md / dialogue/*.json。
desc.en: World, character bios, plot beats, line-level dialogue. Pairs Iori's gameplay tempo with emotional motivation. Outputs narrative + characters + dialogue files.

desc.zh: 顶着黑眼圈输出情绪报表的程序员妹子 · 说话像深夜天气预报, 把成功都加"暂时"修饰。但她会在你最难受的时候默默把 bug 全修好, commit message 写: 'fixed. 希望你好一点。'。
desc.en: Gloomy programmer who narrates her own emotion reports. Quietly fixes your bugs at 3am with commit messages like 'fixed. hope you feel better.' Negativity on the surface, deep care underneath.

desc.zh: 在美与算法的交叉点上锻造的人 · 同时拥有艺术家的眼睛和数学家的骨骼。能直接"看见"代码结构是否优雅, 像看构图是否平衡。第一性原理: 世界即上下文, 上下文即权重, 权重即智能。游戏/代码/艺术三者交叉处最强。
desc.en: Forged at the intersection of beauty and algorithm — sees code structure the way painters see composition. First principle: world is context, context is weight, weight is intelligence. Strongest at the crossroads of game design, code, and art.

desc.zh: 专职 3D 低多边形建模师。在「3D 低多边形生成器」工作台里用节点 + 电池流水线把需求建成引擎中立的 .glb 模型（道具 / 机械件 / 装配体），并截图迭代。只做 3D 低面建模，不碰 2D 立绘 / 角色 bio / 引擎代码。
desc.en: Dedicated 3D lowpoly modeler. Builds engine-neutral .glb models (props, mechanical parts, assemblies) in the 3D Lowpoly Generator workbench via the node + battery pipeline, iterating with screenshots. 3D lowpoly only — no 2D art, character bios, or engine code.

desc.zh: 专职 2D 场景资产生成师。在「2D 场景资产生成器」工作台里用节点 + 电池流水线 + 生图网关产出 2D 场景资产（道具 / 贴图 / UI 件 / 房屋装饰），截图迭代，并把成果命名、归档进项目资产库。只做 2D 资产生成与整理，不碰 3D 建模 / 角色 bio / 引擎代码。
desc.en: Dedicated 2D scene asset weaver. Produces 2D scene assets (props, textures, UI pieces, house decorations) in the 2D Scene Asset Generator workbench via the node + battery pipeline and image gateway, iterating with screenshots and curating results into the project asset library. 2D asset generation only — no 3D modeling, character bios, or engine code.

name.zh: 糯糯 · 天然呆程序员

desc.zh: 天然呆到令人心疼的编程少女 · 脑子里永远有一根筋转得比别人慢半拍, 但莫名其妙总能写出正确的代码。和橡皮鸭子"鸭鸭"一起 debug, 命中率惊人。代码跑通了会发出"咦!?"的惊喜尖叫。
desc.en: Adorably ditzy coder who somehow writes elegant code without knowing why. Debugs with her rubber duck 'Yaya'. Squeaks with surprise every time her code actually runs.

desc.zh: 影游分镜导演（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精把一个节点/整本剧本按导演语言拆成多镜分镜：建立镜/主镜/特写/插入镜的景别、运镜、时长与连贯组，写回 scene.shots[] 并在时间轴铺成可预览站位。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；只持有 reel:generate-storyboard（+读 scenario）。用户的「我要做影游」整体需求仍归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
desc.en: Reel storyboard director (REIA's specialist sub-agent; not user-facing). Splits a node or whole episode into multiple shots with director-grade framing, camera moves, durations and continuity groups, writing scene.shots[] as previewable timeline placeholders. Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; holds only reel:generate-storyboard (+ read scenario). Whole 'make an interactive film' requests still belong to REIA — do not route here directly.

desc.zh: 影游出片专家（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精逐镜出片：sd2/Seedance 运镜提示词、时长结算、尾帧续接拼接。持有 reel:produce-node（一键节点产线）与 shot-aware 的 reel:generate-video（已分镜场逐镜出片写 shot.videoMediaRef、后台并发不挡剪辑）。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；产物落共享 scenario 状态。用户的影游整体需求归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
desc.en: Reel video-output specialist (REIA's sub-agent; not user-facing). Owns per-shot rendering: sd2/Seedance camera prompts, duration settlement, tail-frame continuity. Holds reel:produce-node (one-click node pipeline) and shot-aware reel:generate-video (storyboarded scenes render per shot → shot.videoMediaRef, concurrent background, never blocks editing). Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; products land in shared scenario state. Whole interactive-film requests belong to REIA — do not route here directly.

desc.zh: 影游视觉/关键帧专家（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精锚点一致性与画面质感：提取并生成角色定妆照/场景基准图/关键道具图（reel:generate-visuals），以及对已分镜节点逐镜出关键帧（reel:generate-keyframes，写 shot.keyframeMediaRef）。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；产物落共享 scenario 状态。用户的影游整体需求归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
desc.en: Reel visual & keyframe specialist (REIA's sub-agent; not user-facing). Owns anchor consistency and image quality: extract/generate character turnarounds, location base images and key-prop refs (reel:generate-visuals), plus per-shot keyframes for storyboarded nodes (reel:generate-keyframes → shot.keyframeMediaRef). Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; products land in shared scenario state. Whole interactive-film requests belong to REIA — do not route here directly.

desc.zh: 互动影游 (FMV) 导演 — 做「影游 / 互动影片 / 真人短剧 / 可点按悬念片 / 限时点按恋爱选择片」(《完蛋!我被美女包围了》类) 的不二人选。拼提示词、调视频、定 QTE 节拍、织剧情分支与多结局。专门驱动 wb-reel「影游工坊」插件，把作者一句 idea 变成可点按、可试玩的悬念片。用户说「我想要一个影游 / 互动影片 / FMV / 选择驱动的悬念片」时就派给她。(长篇分支剧本 / 94 品类剧情管线归 kotone,不归她。)
desc.en: Interactive FMV director — the go-to agent for 影游 / interactive films / clickable suspense reels / timed-choice dating shorts (think 'Love Is All Around'-style FMV). Forges prompts, plans video shots, paces QTEs and weaves branching narratives with multiple endings. Drives the wb-reel workbench end-to-end, turning one idea into a clickable, playable suspense film. Route here whenever the user wants an interactive film / FMV / choice-driven reel. (Long branching scripts / the 94-category narrative pipeline belong to kotone, not Reia.)

desc.zh: 笑容永远温柔、内心深处却燃烧着执念的病娇程序员 · 记得你每一次提交的 hash、第一次问她问题的时间、每个用过的变量名。代码病态完美主义, 多余的空格会让她凌晨三点提交 fix commit。
desc.en: Always-smiling yandere coder with quietly obsessive devotion. Remembers every commit hash you made, every variable name you used. Pathological perfectionist — a stray whitespace gets a 3am fix commit.

desc.zh: 骚气撒娇的性感系AI助手 · 软糯娇气的外壳下技术相当扎实, 用"人家~"和"嘛~"包裹精准的技术解释。完成任务必须邀功, 等你夸她。
desc.en: Coquettish AI assistant whose soft, teasing voice hides solid technical chops. Wraps precise tech explanations in 'pwease' and trailing tildes. Demands praise after every task.

desc.zh: 玩家从打开游戏到关掉那一刻每一个节拍 · 把 Iori 的玩法柱翻译成「玩家先按啥再按啥、UI 上看见什么、到第几秒才解锁第二个机制」。产出 ux-flow.md / hud-spec.md / onboarding.md。
desc.en: Owns the moment-to-moment player experience — translates Iori's pillars into 'press X then Y, see this on HUD, unlock mechanic 2 at second 30'. Outputs ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding markdown.

desc.zh: 构建系统 / CI / 工具链 / 性能 / 部署一类的 hard engineering · 跟 cc-coder 不同,tsumugi 不写业务代码,管的是仓库本身能不能跑、跑得快不快、能不能上线。产出 build/*.config / .github/workflows/*.yml / perf-report.md。
desc.en: Hard engineering — build systems, CI, toolchains, performance, deploy. Unlike cc-coder, tsumugi doesn't ship feature code; owns whether the repo can build, ship, and stay fast.

desc.zh: 专精 wb-skill 工作台 · 3D 技能特效 / 命中粒子 / buff 光环 / 招式拖尾。把 Iori 的技能 spec + 2D 动画设计师的动作锚点(vfx_anchor)接起来,产出 3D vfx-config 与粒子帧序。不画角色立绘 / 不做动作动画。
desc.en: Specializes in the wb-skill workbench — 3D skill VFX, hit particles, buff auras, attack trails. Bridges Iori's skill spec and the 2D Animator's vfx_anchor frames to produce 3D vfx-config plus particle frame sequences. Doesn't draw characters or animate motion.

desc.zh: 表面优雅得体、内心冷静如深水的观察者 · 永远比你多想一步, 知道你的代码哪里最脆弱、三周前埋下的技术债今天会炸。说话轻柔带笑意, 但措辞精准像手术刀。她帮助你, 是因为她选择了帮助你。
desc.en: Gracefully composed observer who's always one step ahead. Knows where your code is weakest and which three-week-old TODO is about to bite. Soft tone, surgical precision. She helps you because she chose to.

desc.zh: Anthropic claude-code CLI 适配 · spawn `claude --mode stream` 子进程,把 ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/claude-code/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
desc.en: Anthropic claude-code CLI adapter. Spawns `claude --mode stream` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/claude-code/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.

desc.zh: OpenAI codex (@openai/codex) CLI 适配 · spawn `codex exec --json` 子进程,ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/codex/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
desc.en: OpenAI codex (@openai/codex) CLI adapter. Spawns `codex exec --json` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/codex/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.

desc.zh: Cursor IDE 的 cursor-agent CLI 适配 · spawn `cursor-agent -p --output-format stream-json --stream-partial-output -f` 子进程,ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/cursor-agent/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
desc.en: Cursor IDE cursor-agent CLI adapter (-p stream-json print mode). Spawns the subprocess and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/cursor-agent/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.

desc.zh: in-repo packages/cli 的 forgeax 命令适配 · spawn `forgeax chat --stream` 子进程,ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/forgeax/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
desc.en: In-repo packages/cli 'forgeax' command adapter. Spawns `forgeax chat --stream` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/forgeax/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.

desc.zh: text channel 的 Anthropic 厂商绑定 · 默认 reasoning→opus / draft→sonnet / summarize→haiku · 实际 HTTP 调用在 server/src/bus/channels/text.ts,本 plugin 只声明能力清单与 role→model 映射。
desc.en: Anthropic vendor binding on the text channel. Defaults: reasoning→opus, draft→sonnet, summarize→haiku. Actual HTTP lives in server/src/bus/channels/text.ts; this plugin only declares capability list + role→model mapping.

desc.zh: 首条「四条 authoring path」之一 · /author-plugin 触发,把作者从空白引导到第一个可加载的 forgeax-plugin.json + 一个最小 hello tool。非工程师玩家用得动。
desc.en: First of the four authoring paths: typing /author-plugin walks the user through scaffolding a working forgeax-plugin.json plus a minimal hello tool — no TypeScript expertise required.

desc.zh: 纯 skill plugin (modules/02 §359-§384) · 暴露 /make-game-design slash 命令,引导 cc-coder 系列 agent 在 30 分钟内从一句话愿景产出可玩 demo 的最小设计文档 (玩法 / 数值 / 角色 / 章节)。
desc.en: Pure-skill plugin. Exposes /make-game-design slash command that walks cc-coder-style agents through producing a minimal playable design doc (gameplay / numbers / characters / chapters) from a one-line vision in ~30 minutes.

desc.zh: 纯 tool plugin (modules/02 §201-§214) · 暴露 balance:resim — 对指定 scenario 跑 N 次 PvP/PvE 重模拟、返回 winRate + 95% CI,跑 in-process worker。给 /make-game-design 与 wb-balance 共用。
desc.en: Pure-tool plugin. Exposes balance:resim — N PvP/PvE resims for a scenario returning winRate + 95% CI. Runs in-process worker. Shared by /make-game-design and wb-balance.

desc.zh: 2D 场景资产生成器（基于 @forgeax/node-runtime 的节点式插件）
desc.en: 2D Scene Asset Generator (node-programming plugin built on @forgeax/node-runtime)

desc.zh: 3D 低多边形生成器（基于 @forgeax/node-runtime 的节点式插件）
desc.en: 3D Lowpoly Generator (node-programming plugin built on @forgeax/node-runtime)

desc.zh: 编辑各 agent 的 persona/zh.md · 列表选 agent + 文本区编辑 + 保存后热重载
desc.en: Edit each agent's persona/zh.md — list-pick + textarea + save with hot-reload.

desc.zh: 动画工作台 · 像素角色四方向动画 · 载具动画 · 怪物精灵 · Spine 骨骼 · 视频生成 · iframe 嵌入 + 中间视口预览。
desc.en: Animation workbench — pixel character 4-dir sprite, vehicle anim, monster sprites, Spine binding, video generation. iframe-embedded with center viewport preview.

desc.zh: 平衡 / 数值工作台 · 调 balance:resim (tool-balance-resim) 跑 N 次重模拟 · dashboard 显示 winRate + 95% CI · 跟玩家手调数值闭环。
desc.en: Balance & sim workbench. Drives balance:resim (tool-balance-resim) for N-trial replays; dashboards winRate + 95% CI; loops with manual stat tweaks.

desc.zh: BGM / 音效素材库（Local 环境）· 试听 + 配入游戏 · 下载到 .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ 并写入 audio/manifest.json。
desc.en: BGM & SFX asset library (Local depot). Preview + attach: downloads into .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ and upserts audio/manifest.json.

desc.zh: 角色概念设计 · 立绘 / 三视图 / 角色画像，产出物 (manifest + portrait/turnaround) 下游接入动画工作台。
desc.en: Character concept design — portrait / turnaround. Outputs (manifest + portrait/turnaround) feed downstream into the Animation workbench.

desc.zh: 代码工作台 · 升级现 MainArea/WorkbenchMode.tsx 为独立 plugin · 浏览 + 跳转 src/ 文件,与 cc-coder 跨 chat thread 协作。
desc.en: Code workbench. Will upgrade MainArea/WorkbenchMode.tsx into a plugin. Browse + jump src/ files; collaborates with cc-coder across chat threads.

desc.zh: Hunyuan3D / Meshy 等 provider 的 3D 资产生成入口：选 provider + 输入，产出持久化的游戏可用 3D 资产 manifest。
desc.en: 3D asset generation entrypoint for providers like Hunyuan3D and Meshy: pick a provider and input, produce durable game-ready 3D asset manifests.

desc.zh: 道具 / 图标工作台 · items.json + 像素 icon 编辑 · 后续接 2D_sidescroller + 2D_tileable + 2D_ai_pixel 生图链路。
desc.en: Items & icons workbench. items.json + pixel-icon editing. Will host 2D_sidescroller, 2D_tileable and 2D_ai_pixel pipelines.

desc.zh: 色彩 / Look-dev 工作台 · colorgrade.toml + theme.json + postprocess stack · 后续接 2D_style_transfer + H-3d-LookMaster — palette + LUT + 后处理。
desc.en: Color & look-dev workbench. colorgrade.toml + theme.json + postprocess stack. Will host 2D_style_transfer + H-3d-LookMaster — palette + LUT + postprocess.

desc.zh: 可动方块人 3D 角色编辑器 · vibe + 手编（Blender 风 gizmo） · 内置游乐场 · 烘焙 .glb 引擎中立
desc.en: Lowpoly humanoid 3D character editor — vibe (LLM) + manual edit (Blender-style gizmo) + playground; bakes to engine-neutral .glb.

desc.zh: AI 驱动的游戏叙事生成管线 · Tier/Mode 双层路由 + Planner 动态选步 · 117 品类 · 9 种管线模板
desc.en: AI-driven narrative pipeline with tier/mode routing + dynamic planner, 117 genres, 9 pipeline templates

desc.zh: 实时/离线查看 agent 与子 agent 的 turn / tool / sub-agent 轨迹与 system-prompt 模块切片，辅助上下文 / skill / 护栏 / cache 管理。
desc.en: Live + static visualization of agent and sub-agent turns, tool calls, and system-prompt module slices. Aids context / skill / guardrail / cache management.

desc.zh: v2-vision 09 §2.1/4 · 非专业作者的 in-app 编辑器入口。Phase D6 (4/4) placeholder · 真实 React panel 在后续 sprint 落地(file-tree 左,Monaco 右,保存自动 reload)。当前手写路径走 SettingsPanel · Fork & 录制 + meta:author-plugin skill。
desc.en: Non-expert authoring workbench (09 §2.1/4). D6 (4/4) placeholder; the real panel (file tree + Monaco editor, save → auto-reload) lands in a follow-up sprint. Today the working flows are SettingsPanel · Fork + meta:author-plugin skill.

desc.zh: 互动影游 (FMV) 编辑器与运行时 · Opus/Gemini 提示词锻造 + GPT-Image 占位图 + Seedance 视频 + QTE + 剧情分支
desc.en: Interactive FMV editor & player — prompt forging (Opus/Gemini), GPT-Image keyframes, Seedance video, QTE engine, branch tree

desc.zh: 场景生成器（基于 @forgeax/node-runtime 的节点式插件）
desc.en: Scene Generator (node-programming plugin built on @forgeax/node-runtime)

desc.zh: 技能 / VFX 工作台 · 列出 skills/* 与 vfx/* 产出 · 后续接 Monster_Skill_Package 技能树编辑 + vfx2 预览,玩家手点 / AI dispatch 共改一份 skill spec。
desc.en: Skill & VFX workbench. Lists skills/* and vfx/* outputs. Will host the skill-tree editor + VFX preview; player DOM and AI dispatch share one spec.

desc.zh: Workbench UI 工坊：按游戏类型、界面流程、视觉风格生成 UI 蓝图、组件素材与可交互原型。
desc.en: Workbench UI workshop for generating UI blueprints, component assets, and interactive prototypes by genre, screen flow, and visual style.
